name: test_online_consent_school_moves_with_new_patient
description:
Test: Submit online flu consent for a new child and
change schools.
Steps:
1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools.
2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it.
3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab.
4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears.
Verification:
- The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Submit online flu consent for a new child and
change schools.
Steps:

  1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools.
  2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it.
  3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab.
  4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears.
    Verification:
  • The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'Consent given' Actual value: FluDue vaccinationNasal spray Call log: - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("div.nhsuk-card.app-card.app-card--compact:has(h4:has-text(\"SMITH, Victoria\"))").locator("p:has-text('Flu')") 9 × locator resolved to

…

- unexpected value "FluDue vaccinationNasal spray"
statusTrace:
start_consent_with_session_scheduled = None online_consent_page = schools = [School(name='Sutton Tuition and Reintegration Service', urn='135010', site=None), School(name='Skellingthorpe the Holt Primary School', urn='120400', site=None)] children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Robert', last_name='SANDERSON', nhs_number='9717113165', address=('Flat 85', 'Wright radial...nt(full_name='Megan Collins-Stokes', relationship=, email_address='holmesann@example.net')))]} sessions_search_page = sessions_overview_page = sessions_children_page = dashboard_page = unmatched_consent_responses_page = consent_response_page = create_new_record_consent_response_page = log_in_page = nurse = User(username='revans@example.net', password='revans@example.net', role='nurse') team = Team(name='Dawson Group est. 1822', workgroup='I939R', careplus_venue_code='I939R', email='callumhudson@example.com', phone='+447700900780') def test_online_consent_school_moves_with_new_patient( start_consent_with_session_scheduled, online_consent_page, schools, children, sessions_search_page, sessions_overview_page, sessions_children_page, dashboard_page, unmatched_consent_responses_page, consent_response_page, create_new_record_consent_response_page, log_in_page, nurse, team, ): """ Test: Submit online flu consent for a new child and change schools. Steps: 1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools. 2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it. 3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab. 4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears. Verification: - The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method. """ child = children[Programme.FLU][0] schools = schools[Programme.FLU] online_consent_page.fill_details( child, child.parents[0], schools, change_school=True ) online_consent_page.agree_to_flu_vaccination( consent_option=ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION ) online_consent_page.fill_address_details(*child.address) online_consent_page.answer_health_questions( online_consent_page.get_number_of_health_questions_for_flu( ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION ), yes_to_health_questions=False, ) online_consent_page.click_confirm() online_consent_page.check_final_consent_message( child, programmes=[Programme.FLU], yes_to_health_questions=False, consent_option=ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION, ) log_in_page.navigate() log_in_page.log_in_and_choose_team_if_necessary(nurse, team) dashboard_page.navigate() dashboard_page.click_unmatched_consent_responses() unmatched_consent_responses_page.click_parent_on_consent_record_for_child(child) consent_response_page.click_create_new_record() create_new_record_consent_response_page.create_new_record() dashboard_page.navigate() dashboard_page.click_sessions() sessions_search_page.click_session_for_programme_group(schools[1], Programme.FLU) sessions_overview_page.click_children_tab() sessions_children_page.select_due_vaccination() sessions_children_page.search_for(str(child)) > sessions_children_page.verify_child_shows_correct_flu_consent_method( child, ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION ) tests/test_online_consent_school_moves.py:184: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = child = Child(first_name='Victoria', last_name='SMITH', nhs_number='9753655185', address=('Flat 9', 'Johnson causeway', 'Owent...), Parent(full_name='Hayley Greenwood', relationship=, email_address='amelia30@example.com'))) option = def verify_child_shows_correct_flu_consent_method( self, child: Child, option: ConsentOption, ) -> None: flu_consent_section = self.get_flu_consent_status_locator_from_search(child) > expect(flu_consent_section).to_contain_text("Consent given") E AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'Consent given' E Actual value: FluDue vaccinationNasal spray E Call log: E - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("div.nhsuk-card.app-card.app-card--compact:has(h4:has-text(\"SMITH, Victoria\"))").locator("p:has-text('Flu')") E 9 × locator resolved to
